movie.actors: Charles Bronson, Deborah Raffin, Ed Lauter, Martin Balsam
movie.plot: Architect/vigilante Paul Kersey arrives back in New York City and is forcibly recruited by a crooked police chief to fight street crime caused by a large gang terrorizing the neighborhoods.
movie.title: Death Wish 3
movie.writer: Don Jakoby, Brian Garfield (characters created by)
